master_row.title: Horizontal Lift and Gauge Transport
master_row.canonical_statement: Controlling energy flow at the TZP can produce modifications to gravitational curvature, permitting gravitational manipulation and field generation.
master_row.formation_note: Documented in the source as a differential equation relating Γ, ω, γ.
master_row.dictionary: Because gravity converges with other forces at the TZP, the Hamiltonian term (H_ER = _ g ,R^ T_ , d^4x) couples directly to spacetime curvature, enabling localized gravitational effects and potential propulsion【338427255283747†L41-L45】.
master_row.encyclopedia: Technical interpretation remains tied to the local registry and equation witness. Interpretive role: This entry makes the connection data operational: later curvature and holonomy pages can reuse the same transport law without re-deriving the bundle geometry.
